attack_chain.description: Threat actor conducted scanning and reconnaissance of LastPass infrastructure, identifying four DevSecOps engineers with access to decryption keys as optimal targets.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Through the threat actor's likely rigorous scanning and enumeration phase, they came to the conclusion that attacking a DevSecOps home computer would be their best bet

attack_chain.description: Attacker identified that a DevSecOps engineer's home computer ran a vulnerable version of Plex Media Server (CVE-2020-5741).
attack_chain.evidence_quote: third-party media software running on a DevSecOps engineer's home computer had a fatal vulnerability

attack_chain.description: Exploited CVE-2020-5741 in Plex Media Server on the engineer's home computer to achieve remote code execution.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: This version of the Plex Media Server software had a known vulnerability, CVE-2020-5741, that the threat actor was able to exploit

evidence_chunks.quote: This version of the Plex Media Server software had a known vulnerability, CVE-2020-5741, that the threat actor was able to exploit
This version of the Plex Media Server software had a known vulnerability, CVE-2020-5741, that the threat actor was able to exploit

attack_chain.description: Installed a keylogger on the DevSecOps engineer's home computer to capture credentials.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the threat actor was able to install a keylogger on the engineer's computer

attack_chain.description: Captured the engineer's master password after MFA authentication via the keylogger, enabling access to the corporate vault.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: they were able to capture the engineer's master password as it was entered after logging in with multifactor authentication

attack_chain.description: Using stolen master password, accessed the encrypted corporate (LastPass) vault to retrieve additional credentials and decryption keys.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: With the DevSecOps engineer's credentials secured, access to the encrypted corporate vault was easy

attack_chain.description: Used a third-party VPN service to mask origin and impersonate the engineer, bypassing intrusion detection.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: bypass intrusion detection systems thanks to the use of a third-party VPN service

evidence_chunks.quote: bypass intrusion detection systems thanks to the use of a third-party VPN service
bypass intrusion detection systems thanks to the use of a third-party VPN service

attack_chain.description: Logged into the cloud-based development environment impersonating the software engineer using stolen IAM credentials.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: allowed them to impersonate the software engineer

evidence_chunks.quote: allowed them to impersonate the software engineer
allowed them to impersonate the software engineer

attack_chain.technique_name: Data from Information Repositories: Code Repositories
attack_chain.description: Exfiltrated fourteen source code repositories from the cloud-based development environment containing cleartext embedded credentials, digital certificates, and encrypted production credentials.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the threat actor exfiltrated fourteen code repositories from the cloud-based development environment

attack_chain.description: Harvested cleartext embedded credentials and encrypted credentials used for production backup capabilities from stolen source code.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: some of these source code repositories included cleartext embedded credentials, stored digital certificates related to our development environments, and some encrypted credentials used for production capabilities such as backup

attack_chain.description: Second incident: attacker leveraged stolen data to target another senior DevOps engineer and obtain AWS credentials/decryption keys for production backups.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The second incident against Lastpass occurs (8/12/2022-10/26/2022)

evidence_chunks.quote: The second incident against Lastpass occurs (8/12/2022-10/26/2022)
The second incident against Lastpass occurs (8/12/2022-10/26/2022)

attack_chain.description: Engaged in new reconnaissance and enumeration of LastPass AWS S3 storage buckets.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: engaged in a new series of reconnaissance, enumeration, and exfiltration activities, which involved LastPass' AWS S3 storage buckets

attack_chain.description: Accessed AWS S3 buckets and third-party cloud storage containing archived backups of LastPass production data, including customer vault backups and customer PII.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the threat gained access to a third-party cloud-based storage service used to store archived backups of LastPass production data

evidence_chunks.quote: the threat gained access to a third-party cloud-based storage service used to store archived backups of LastPass production data
the threat gained access to a third-party cloud-based storage service used to store archived backups of LastPass production data

attack_chain.technique_name: Exfiltration Over Web Service: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
attack_chain.description: Exfiltrated five binary large object (BLOB) database shards and encrypted customer vault backups plus an encryption key.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The threat used their access to start copying 'five binary large objects database shards'. The exfiltration of the database backups began.

initial_access_vector: Exploited CVE-2020-5741 in outdated Plex Media Server on a senior DevSecOps engineer's home computer to achieve RCE, install a keylogger, and capture corporate vault master password post-MFA.
persistence_mechanism: Impersonated valid DevSecOps engineer account via stolen IAM credentials and routed traffic through a third-party VPN to blend in with legitimate activity until credentials were reset.
privilege_escalation: Targeted one of only four DevSecOps engineers with direct access to the corporate vault containing decryption keys, bypassing the need to escalate privileges; in second incident, obtained decryption keys from compromised engineer to decrypt production backups.
